please be careful.. this is a patch for the Japanese version of 
p5-Mail-SpamAssassin.

it WAS submitted by the maintainer of the Japanese version.

please do NOT apply this to the base  security/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin.  
apply it to the Japanese version.
